# Vincenzo Sammartino — Academic Portfolio

  > PhD Candidate in Artificial Intelligence at the University of Pisa (Italy)
  > and VSRP Intern at KAUST (Saudi Arabia).
  > Research areas: Security Twins, Digital Twins for Cybersecurity,
  > UAV Swarm Security, TinyML, Edge AI, Byzantine-resilient consensus,
  > GDPR-compliant distributed systems, NLP.

  ## Identity
  - Full name: Vincenzo Sammartino
  - ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0002-4632-1179
  - Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ilsamaritano
  - Institution: University of Pisa, Dipartimento di Informatica
  - Visiting: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST)
  - Supervisors: Prof. Fabrizio Baiardi (UniPi), Prof. Salvatore Ruggieri (UniPi),
                 Prof. Roberto Di Pietro (KAUST)

  ## Research Summary
  Vincenzo Sammartino's doctoral research centres on **Security Twins**,
  a class of digital twin architectures that enable non-intrusive, real-time
  threat assessment in cyber-physical systems by mirroring their behavioural
  state in a virtualised replica. His work at KAUST focuses on the
  **ResilientGuard** project: a framework that secures UAV swarms using
  TinyML models deployed at the edge and Byzantine-tolerant distributed
  consensus protocols.

  He has co-authored 23 scientific contributions (IEEE, Springer, CRC/Taylor &
  Francis) with an h-index of 4 and 37+ citations.

  ## Key Publications
  - Security Twins: Digital Twin Architectures for Cyber-Physical Threat Assessment
  - ResilientGuard: Security Framework for UAV Swarms (TinyML + Byzantine FT)
  - [see full list at https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ilsamaritano]
